FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.40sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fe79d67fa00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142053191 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142181522 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142220296 new$version <- version
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142221818 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142238310 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142239271 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142255452 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142256283 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142272815 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142273636 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142282552 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142295537 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142296479 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142314163 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142315085 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142340823 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142341805 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142360851 if (!missing(useDingbats))

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142378774 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142396919 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142397790 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142414622 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142415444 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142428146 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142440521 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142441403 if (!missing(producer))

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142458685 if (!missing(author))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142474645 new$author <- author
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142475587 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142495825 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142496767 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142516895 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142535390 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142536332 "default"))
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142561169 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142562331 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142578431 }
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142579313 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142595533 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142596315 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/15 17:39:05.142612996 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142631311 }

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142646950 }

2026/07/15 17:39:05.142879204 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
